title: Spike.sh Incident
description: Schema for an incident in the Spike.sh incident management platform.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the incident

metadata.description: Additional incident metadata from the triggering integration

escalation.description: ID of the escalation policy applied to this incident

integration.description: ID of the integration that triggered this incident

publicSharing.description: Whether this incident is publicly shareable

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the incident was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the incident was last updated
